title: Aureline human-readable durable artifact registry
description: Boundary schema for artifacts/governance/human_readable_artifacts.yaml and worked examples under fixtures/governance/human_readable_artifact_examples/. The registry freezes the canonical inventory of user-owned, workspace-owned, generated-but-reviewable, and managed-only text-first durable artifact families. Each row records the text format, schema home, comment and unknown-field preservation posture, ordering expectations, VCS review posture, portability expectation, and editability class so loaders, formatters, migration tools, and support flows do not invent format rules independently.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this registry document shape. Current value is 1.

source_specs.description: Optional list of source documents that motivated the seeded registry rows.

editability_classes.description: Optional vocabulary list for editability classes. The artifact rows reference editability_class values from this set.

artifact_families.description: Registry rows describing one artifact family each.

scenario.description: Short description of what the fixture demonstrates.

doc_sections.description: Optional list of doc section headings exercised by this fixture.

path_ref.description: Repo-relative path, example path, or document reference. Consumers treat it as opaque text.

owner_class.description: Who owns the artifact's meaning and can legitimately author changes. generator indicates the file is written by tools but still reviewable.

authorship_class.description: Authorship posture: user_authored is edited directly by the user; workspace_authored is committed with the project; generated_reviewable is produced by tools but intended for review; managed_only is governed by policy or admin distribution and is not a general-purpose edit surface.

format_class.description: On-disk format family for the artifact.

ordering_policy.description: Ordering posture for keys, blocks, or rows.

vcs_review_posture.description: Whether the artifact is expected to be reviewed through version control.

may_autoformat_without_user_review.description: Whether Aureline may auto-format this class without a user review step.

may_canonicalize_without_user_review.description: Whether Aureline may canonicalize ordering/whitespace for this class without a user review step.

requires_preview_before_write.description: Whether any write in this class requires a preview step.

schema_home.description: Repo-relative schema location governing this artifact family, or contract_not_yet_seeded when the schema is not yet published.

canonical_locations.description: Example paths, globs, or location concepts where this family lives.

policy_refs.description: Documents that define the format/preservation/write rules this row inherits.

notes.description: Optional notes clarifying edge cases or special handling.
